---
title: "Final Project Workshop"
params:
  number: 11
  purpose: 'The purpose of this assignment is to....'
---

```{r child = here::here("fragments", "hw.qmd")}
```

This week's HW is to just get together with your teammates and make an agenda for what you want to discuss with Professor Helveston in your next [Team Workshop Meeting](https://eda.seas.gwu.edu/2026-Fall/class/13-workshop-final-analysis.html). This will be your last opportunity to meet with Professor Helveston before the Thanksgiving break, so please come prepared with a list of questions and / or ideas that you want feedback on.

Although this is a team task, please each person submit a copy of your proposed meeting agenda, along with any other individual reflections or ideas that you would also like to leave.
